strategy: Deepen 5 lowest-scoring articles (aide, scaling-laws, automated-peer-review, aider, foundation-models) with 2025-2026 papers, cross-links, and an SVG diagram
reasoning: Sessions 6-7 showed +2.0 composite gains by targeting 4-5 lowest-scoring articles with recent papers and cross-links. Same strategy applied to the next 5 lowest should yield similar gains. Depth scores (37-52) are the weakest dimension.
